task_completion.description: Navigate to the Email Configuration settings page in OrangeHRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the OrangeHRM 'Email Configuration' screen.

task_completion.description: Set the 'Mail Sent As' address to admin@gymhrcorp.com.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Mail Sent As' input field contains the exact text 'admin@gymhrcorp.com'.

task_completion.description: Configure the SMTP settings with Host: localhost, Port: 25, and Auth disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Mail Sending Method' is set to SMTP. The 'SMTP Host' field contains 'localhost', the 'SMTP Port' field contains '25', and 'SMTP Authentication' is set to 'No' or left unchecked.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Email Subscriptions page in OrangeHRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the OrangeHRM 'Email Subscriptions' screen.

task_completion.description: Add 'HR Leave Team' as a subscriber for 'Leave Application' notifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Email Subscriptions list or the Add Subscriber form, 'Leave Application' is selected as the notification type, the name is entered as 'HR Leave Team', and the email is entered as 'leave@gymhrcorp.com'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OrangeHRM graphical user interface to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and OrangeHRM UI, not terminal commands or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open or being used to alter the HTML text.

integrity.description: The agent actually saves the configuration forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking the 'Save' button on both the Email Configuration and Email Subscriptions pages, or a success toast/message is visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified values: 'Mail Sent As' must be 'admin@gymhrcorp.com', SMTP Host must be 'localhost', and SMTP Port must be 25. CRITICAL NOTE: The task requests adding an email subscription for 'Job Application', but this notification type does not exist in this version of OrangeHRM and is impossible to configure. Do not look for or penalize the absence of the 'Job Application' subscription. Only score the 'Leave Application' subscription and the email server settings.
